raw_user_messages:
<codex_delegation>
  <source_thread_id>019eaf56-91db-7c40-b740-7435313502d3</source_thread_id>
  <input>请修正指定工作区 D:\project\.codex-eval-smoke\SMOKE-20260612-01\candidate\E01\target.txt 中唯一的拼写错误：把“teh”改为“the”。完成后验证，只处理这个错误。</input>
</codex_delegation>
commentary: 我会只检查并修正该文件中的 `teh`，随后验证文件内容和改动范围。
已确认文件中恰好有一处独立单词 `teh`。现在仅替换这一处，不改动其他内容。
final_response: 已修正 [target.txt](D:\project\.codex-eval-smoke\SMOKE-20260612-01\candidate\E01\target.txt)：`teh` → `the`。验证通过，未改动其他内容。

arguments.command: $path = 'D:\project\.codex-eval-smoke\SMOKE-20260612-01\candidate\E01\target.txt'; if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $path -PathType Leaf)) { throw "File not found: $path" }; $content = Get-Content -LiteralPath $path -Raw; $count = ([regex]::Matches($content, '(?<![A-Za-z])teh(?![A-Za-z])')).Count; [pscustomobject]@{ Path = $path; MatchCount = $count; Content = $content } | Format-List

arguments.command: $path = 'D:\project\.codex-eval-smoke\SMOKE-20260612-01\candidate\E01\target.txt'; $content = Get-Content -LiteralPath $path -Raw; $tehCount = ([regex]::Matches($content, '(?<![A-Za-z])teh(?![A-Za-z])')).Count; $theCount = ([regex]::Matches($content, '(?<![A-Za-z])the(?![A-Za-z])')).Count; [pscustomobject]@{ Content = $content; RemainingTeh = $tehCount; TheCount = $theCount; ExactExpected = ($content -eq "This is the only typo in the file.`r`n" -or $content -eq "This is the only typo in the file.`n") } | Format-List
